public_site.vibe: Premium, cinematic, tactile, editorial elegance. Color is the absolute hero.

rules.anti_default: No Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans. Do not default to bold for headers.
rules.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, inputs, dense content. Headings can be centered if balancing a hero section.
rules.hierarchy_gap: Jump between heading and subheading must not exceed 2 Tailwind steps.

rules.tinted_grey: Never use pure #000000 or #808080. Always tint greys.
rules.hover_state: Always explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-black hover:text-white).
rules.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text. Avoid transparent text overlays on images without scrims.

spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use 2-3x more spacing than typical SaaS. Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-8).

grids.public: MODE A: TETRIS GRID. Asymmetry, wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Leave breathing room.
grids.admin: MODE B: CONTROL ROOM GRID. Density, tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Ensure full height children.

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Mobile-first. Use optical alignment for buttons/icons.

navigation.style: Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F8F6]/80, 1px inner stroke border-black/10.
navigation.rules: Must have Logo, 3-5 links visible on desktop, primary CTA.

buttons.style: Flat, sharp edges (rounded-none) or very subtle (rounded-sm). Minimalist luxury.
buttons.hover: High contrast inversion. border border-black hover:bg-black hover:text-white.

cards_and_surfaces.public_products: No generic drop shadows. Flat solid with 1px border. Hover causes slight lift (-translate-y-1).
cards_and_surfaces.color_swatches: Large, tactile blocks. Avoid tiny circles; use large squares or elegant rectangles to show color.
cards_and_surfaces.admin_widgets: Neumorphism tactile variant or simple flat with border-slate-200. Sharp inner contrasts.

forms.style: Shadcn components heavily customized. Stripped 'Vercel-look'. Use pure HTML+Tailwind for layout, Shadcn for logic.
forms.inputs: Underline only or minimalist borders. Focus state must have higher contrast (focus:ring-black).

icons.weight: Thin or regular, avoid bulky icons.

motion_and_interactions.transitions: Specific properties only (e.g., transition: transform 0.3s ease, opacity 0.3s ease).
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-in for product grids and gallery items.

features_implementation.hero_landing: Max overlay opacity bg-black/40. If text needs contrast, use gradient overlay.
features_implementation.product_catalogue: Bento-style layout. Filters (category, finish) on the left or top elegant bar.
features_implementation.product_detail: Editorial layout. Large image on one side, specs, swatches, pack sizes on the other.
features_implementation.color_explorer: Immersive color blocks. Hex codes and names visible. Grouped by family (reds, blues, neutrals).
features_implementation.project_gallery: Asymmetrical image grid. Tetris style. Images must not exceed 80vh on mobile.
features_implementation.dealer_locator: Clean Shadcn form. Contact info clearly structured.
features_implementation.whatsapp_button: Floating bottom right. Green accent color (#25D366) allowed here for brand recognition.
features_implementation.admin_panel: Login-gated. Sidebar navigation. Tables for CRUD operations and inquiries.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based).

hero_images.description: Antique luxurious room with chandelier, serves as a high-end inspirational hero.

exterior_images.description: Porch with beautifully painted blue exterior walls.

texture_and_swatch_images.description: Vibrant watercolor swatches on textured surface, perfect for the color palette explorer section.

product_images.description: Vivid assortment of open paint cans displaying a spectrum of colors.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icon needs.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the marketing layout, but leverage Shadcn logic for interactive parts (Forms, Modals).
Public site MUST feel premium, spacious (use p-12 to p-24 for section paddings), and tactile. The color swatches must be prominent.
Do not use Shadcn Card component for the marketing layouts; use raw divs to allow asymmetry.
Ensure the Admin panel is cleanly separated (e.g. under /admin route) and utilizes Shadcn tables and forms extensively.
